kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance. Use this keyword for quick experiments or debugging sessions.

test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Given I Am On The Login Page
Verify Current Url
kw.msg: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.
kw.doc: Verifies the current url contains expected value
kw.status: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.

kw.doc: Ensures the login page is loaded
kw.status: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.

kw.name: When I Login With Credentials
Login With Credentials
kw.msg: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.
kw.doc: Performs a full login with username and password
kw.status: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.

kw.doc: Logs in using the given credentials
kw.status: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.

kw.name: Then The User Is Redirected To Secure Area
Verify Current Url
kw.msg: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.
kw.doc: Verifies the current url contains expected value
kw.status: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.

kw.doc: Verifies redirection to the secure area
kw.status: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.

kw.name: And The Success Message Is Displayed
Verify Flash Message Contains
kw.msg: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.
kw.doc: Verifies the flash message contains the expected text
kw.status: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.

kw.doc: Verifies the success message
kw.status: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

test.doc: Verify successful login redirects to secure area with success message
test.status:
Several failures occurred:
1) Keyword with same name defined multiple times.
2) Keyword with same name defined multiple times.
3) Keyword with same name defined multiple times.
4) Keyword with same name defined multiple times.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

Click Logout Button

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
